message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Admin
actor User
participant "AccountManagement" as AM
participant "Broker" as Broker
participant "Notifications" as Notifications
participant "UAA" as UAA
participant "EmailSender" as EmailSender

Admin -> AM: WorkspaceInvitation
note right of AM: with email
AM -> AM: save data to db
AM --> Admin: 200 response
AM -> Broker: create event "new user invited event"
Broker -> Notifications: read event
note right of Notifications: with email and senderId
Notifications -> UAA: read info about sender
Notifications -> Notifications: generate email
Broker -> Notifications: create "new email event"
Broker -> EmailSender: read "new email event"
EmailSender --> Admin: send email

alt [user accepts invitation]
  User -> AM: WorkspaceEmailValidation
  AM -> AM: check email
  AM --> User: WorkspaceEmailValidationResult
  alt [email valid]
    AM -> AM: generate access code
    AM -> Broker: create event "new access code"
    Broker -> Notifications: read event
    note right of Notifications: with email and access code
    Notifications -> Notifications: generate email
    Broker -> Notifications: create "new email event"
    Broker -> EmailSender: read "new email event"
    EmailSender --> User: send email
  end
  User -> User: get access code from email
  User -> AM: WorkspaceAccessCodeValidation
  AM --> User: WorkspaceAccessCodeValidationResult
  note right of AM: with email, access code
  alt [access code valid]
    AM -> AM: change state
    User -> UAA: WorkspaceRegistration
    note right of UAA: with email, username, password and code
    UAA -> AM: check state by email
    note right of AM: with userId and email
    AM -> Broker: create new event "user created event"
    Broker -> Notifications: read event "user created event"
    Notifications -> Notifications: create user with email
  end
end

@enduml
